manifest.name: CJK Cross-Script Search

name: CJK Cross-Script Search

releases.author: sai1047976
releases.description:
First public release of CJK Cross-Script Search.

Type `萬維鋼` in Obsidian's global search and find files containing `万维钢` (and vice versa). Bridges Taiwan/Mainland term variants like `軟體 ↔ 软件` via OpenCC.

## Features

- Rewrites global search queries using Obsidian's native `OR` syntax — no regex blob shown to user, input box keeps your original text
- Covers both typing and programmatic search calls (dual hook: `SearchView.setQuery` prototype + `SearchComponent.changeCallback` per-instance)
- IME composition gate — 注音/拼音/日文/한국어 candidate windows are not disrupted
- Two OpenCC variants: **Taiwan** (default, bridges Taiwan idioms) or **Basic** (char-only, fewer false positives)
- Debug toggle in settings prints rewritten queries to console

## Compatibility

Obsidian ≥ 1.5.0. Desktop and mobile.

## Install

Until the plugin is approved in the community store:

1. Download `main.js` and `manifest.json` below
2. Drop both into `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/cjk-cross-search/`
3. Reload Obsidian and enable in Settings → Community Plugins

See [README](https://github.com/sai1047976/obsidian-cjk-cross-search#readme) for details.
releases.name: v0.1.0 — initial release
